hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "try { (New-Object Media.SoundPlayer 'C:\Windows\Media\Windows Notify System Generic.wav').PlaySync() } catch { [console]::beep(1000,700) }; (New-Object -ComObject Wscript.Shell).Popup('Claude Code is waiting for your input', 8, 'Duty Manager', 64)"

powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "try { (New-Object Media.SoundPlayer 'C:\Windows\Media\tada.wav').PlaySync() } catch { [console]::beep(1200,400) }; (New-Object -ComObject Wscript.Shell).Popup('Claude Code finished responding', 5, 'Duty Manager', 64)"
